title: Just tested out Monday Magic!
excerpt:

Now in alpha, monday magic is an AI-powered work solution that helps you create tailored solutions faster than ever. No more tedious overhead! Simply des…

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Exciting news from monday.com: monday magic is here!

Now in alpha, monday magic is an AI-powered work solution that helps you create tailored solutions faster than ever. No more tedious overhead! Simply describe your needs with a prompt, and AI will build a fully functional solution that can be added directly within the monday.com platform, streamlining your workflow and eliminating rigid software constraints.

As a #mondayambassador, I had the chance to try out monday magic early, and I have to say that it was really fun to use! I think there is room for improvement, but if you give it an idea or a general direction, it’ll create the solution for you.

Things I liked:

  • Quick to create the idea.
  • Can be very simple and creative, which is a good thing.
  • Creates the automations automatically.
  • Goes directly to your board.
  • Builds an onboarding video!
  • Provides a Solution Summary!

Things I wish:

  • Communication skills like with ChatGPT.
  • Formula-building is a no-no.
  • Doesn’t fully follow instructions, especially if not concise or long-winded.

Overall Thoughts: HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!

Try it yourself here https://mondaymagic.ai/ and let me know what you think in the comments!

Unfortunately, my videos are too big, so I can’t share them, but I’m happy to discuss my full thoughts here!

posts.author: WirkKarl (Karl)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the breakdown, David! I’ve just started experimenting with monday magic myself and agree — the speed and automation features are super impressive. Totally with you on the formula limitations though — hoping they improve that soon. Curious to see how this evolves once it’s out of alpha. It really feels like it could redefine how we build workflows. Looking forward to hearing more of your experiences!

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks Karl. It was really interesting to create it.

I felt that monday magic did a better job with less context or details. Just give it a 1-2 sentence of what you want to build, and then afterwards provides details after it finishes the first mock.

posts.author: juanzevallos (Juan Jose)
posts.cookedHtml: I tried it a few days ago to make a demo to a client of a legal department and really impressive! I created just what the client wanted and saved a lot of time, I imagine it’s going to get better and better
